query:
SELECT learning_id  AS "learning_id!: i64",
                  title_norm   AS "title_norm!: String",
                  author_norm  AS "author_norm!: String",
                  asin         AS "asin!: String",
                  source       AS "source!: String",
                  learned_at   AS "learned_at!: String"
             FROM asin_learnings
            ORDER BY learned_at DESC, learning_id DESC
            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
